name: antigravity-workflows
description: Orchestrate multiple Antigravity skills through guided workflows for SaaS MVP delivery, security audits, AI agent builds, and browser QA.
capabilities: Route user requests to appropriate workflow templates
Execute multi-phase workflows with step-by-step guidance
Validate completion criteria before proceeding to next step
Coordinate multiple specialized skills in sequence
Provide structured completion reports with artifacts and risks
Handle missing skills gracefully with fallback recommendations
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All 20 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The scanner incorrectly flagged YAML frontmatter as cryptographic code and markdown code fences as shell commands. The skill contains only documentation and workflow guidance - no executable code, no shell commands, no cryptographic operations. This is a safe workflow orchestration skill.
valueStatement: Complex multi-step tasks require coordinating many skills. This skill automatically sequences skill invocations with validation checkpoints.
limitations: Does not execute code directly - orchestrates other skills only
Requires referenced skills to be installed locally
Cannot guarantee success without proper environment and credentials
Stack-specific skills may require matching skill in repository

useCases.targetUser: Startup founders and developers building new products
useCases.title: Ship a SaaS MVP
useCases.description: Complete guided workflow from planning through deployment with validation at each phase.

useCases.title: Run a Security Audit
useCases.description: Execute comprehensive security review workflow with authorization checks and risk reporting.

useCases.targetUser: AI engineers and product teams building agent products
useCases.title: Build an AI Agent System
useCases.description: Guided workflow for constructing AI agent architectures with checkpoint validation.

promptTemplates.title: Start SaaS MVP Workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows to run the "Ship a SaaS MVP" workflow for my project idea.
promptTemplates.scenario: User wants to build and ship a new SaaS product

promptTemplates.title: Run Security Audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows and execute a full "Security Audit for a Web App" workflow.

promptTemplates.title: Build AI Agent
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows to guide me through "Build an AI Agent System" with checkpoints.
promptTemplates.scenario: User is building an AI agent or LLM-powered product

promptTemplates.title: Browser Automation QA
promptTemplates.prompt: Use @antigravity-workflows to execute the "QA and Browser Automation" workflow and stabilize flaky tests.
promptTemplates.scenario: User needs E2E testing and browser automation

bestPractices: Confirm scope and objectives before starting any workflow
Validate each step completion before proceeding to the next
Review artifacts and open risks at workflow completion
antiPatterns: Skipping validation steps to move faster
Assuming all required skills are available without checking
Running destructive actions without explicit user approval

faq.question: What skills does this skill orchestrate?
faq.answer: This skill coordinates other Antigravity skills like concise-planning, brainstorming, workflow-automation, and verification-before-completion.

faq.question: Does this skill execute code directly?
faq.answer: No. This is a workflow orchestrator that guides the AI to invoke other skills in sequence. It does not execute code itself.

faq.question: What happens if a required skill is missing?
faq.answer: The skill will state the gap and recommend falling back to the closest available skill.

faq.question: Can I customize workflows?
faq.answer: Yes, you can modify the workflow definitions in docs/WORKFLOWS.md or data/workflows.json.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for production deployments?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance but success depends on your environment, credentials, and infrastructure availability.

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
